evidence.title: README (segment 1)
evidence.excerpt: **MCPProxy** is an open-source desktop application that super-charges AI agents with intelligent tool discovery, massive token savings, and built-in security quarantine against malicious MCP servers.

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: System Tray - Upstream Servers          System Tray - Quarantine Management

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: - **Scale beyond API limits** – Federate hundreds of MCP servers while bypassing Cursor's 40-tool limit and OpenAI's 128-function cap. - **Save tokens & accelerate responses** – Agents load just one `retrieve_tools` function instead of hundreds of schemas. Research shows ~99 % token reduction with **43 % accuracy improvement**. - **Advanced security protection** – Automatic quarantine blocks Tool Poisoning Attacks until you manually approve new servers. - **Works offline & cross-platform** – Native binaries for macOS (Intel & Apple Silicon), Windows (x64 & ARM64), and Linux (x64 & ARM64) with system-tray UI.

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: Download the latest DMG installer for your architecture: - **Apple Silicon (M1/M2):** [Download DMG](https://github.com/smart-mcp-proxy/mcpproxy-go/releases/latest) → `mcpproxy-*-darwin-arm64.dmg` - **Intel Mac:** [Download DMG](https://github.com/smart-mcp-proxy/mcpproxy-go/releases/latest) → `mcpproxy-*-darwin-amd64.dmg`

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: Download the latest Windows installer for your architecture: - **x64 (64-bit):** [Download Installer](https://github.com/smart-mcp-proxy/mcpproxy-go/releases/latest) → `mcpproxy-setup-*-amd64.exe` - **ARM64:** [Download Installer](https://github.com/smart-mcp-proxy/mcpproxy-go/releases/latest) → `mcpproxy-setup-*-arm64.exe`

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: The installer automatically: - Installs both `mcpproxy.exe` (core server) and `mcpproxy-tray.exe` (system tray app) to Program Files - Adds MCPProxy to your system PATH for command-line access - Creates Start Menu shortcuts - Supports silent installation: `.\mcpproxy-setup.exe /VERYSILENT`

evidence.title: v0.29.2
evidence.excerpt: This release focuses on bug fixes and UX improvements, enhancing real-time synchronization of server states after tool approval and improving dashboard navigation. ## Bug Fixes - **Fixed server state synchronization issue** where the `servers.changed` event wasn't being emitted after tool approval, causing UI components to display stale server information until manual refresh - **Resolved data inconsistency** in the UI store where missing server fields weren't properly cleared during merge operations, potentially leading to phantom data being displayed ## New Features - **Enhanced dashboard navigation** with clickable KPI cards on Activity, Servers, and Agent Tokens pages, allowing users to quickly drill down into specific metrics and data sets directly from the overview cards --- ## Download Installers | Platform | Download | Notes | |----------|----------|-------| | **macOS (Apple Silicon)** | [**Download DMG**](https://github.com/smart-mcp-proxy/mcpproxy-go/releases/download/v0.29.2/mcpproxy-0.29.2-darwin-arm64-installer.dmg) | Signed & Notarized - Recommended for M1/M2/M3/M4 | | **macOS (Intel)** | [**Download DMG**](https://github.com/smart-mcp-proxy/mcpproxy-go/releases/down…

evidence.title: v0.29.1
evidence.excerpt: This patch release fixes a critical Docker recovery issue affecting macOS users running MCPProxy under launchd. ## Bug Fixes **Personal Edition (macOS)** - Fixed Docker recovery mechanism that could fail when MCPProxy runs as a launchd service due to minimal PATH environment and stale state handling. The upstream connection now properly survives Docker restarts even in restricted execution environments. --- ## Download Installers | Platform | Download | Notes | |----------|----------|-------| | **macOS (Apple Silicon)** | [**Download DMG**](https://github.com/smart-mcp-proxy/mcpproxy-go/releases/download/v0.29.1/mcpproxy-0.29.1-darwin-arm64-installer.dmg) | Signed & Notarized - Recommended for M1/M2/M3/M4 | | **macOS (Intel)** | [**Download DMG**](https://github.com/smart-mcp-proxy/mcpproxy-go/releases/download/v0.29.1/mcpproxy-0.29.1-darwin-amd64-installer.dmg) | Signed & Notarized | | **Windows (64-bit)** | [**Download Setup**](https://github.com/smart-mcp-proxy/mcpproxy-go/releases/download/v0.29.1/mcpproxy-setup-v0.29.1-amd64.exe) | Setup wizard | | **Windows (ARM64)** | [**Download Setup**](https://github.com/smart-mcp-proxy/mcpproxy-go/releases/download/v0.29.1/mcpproxy-setu…

evidence.title: v0.29.0
evidence.excerpt: This release enhances the onboarding experience with an adaptive wizard and improves the release pipeline stability. ## New Features * **Adaptive Onboarding Wizard v2** - Completely redesigned onboarding flow featuring: - New sidebar-based Setup interface for better navigation - Sectioned import workflow for clearer configuration steps - Passive verification mode that doesn't interrupt the setup process - Enhanced user experience for first-time users getting started with MCPProxy * **Onboarding Funnel Telemetry** - Added comprehensive analytics to track user onboarding progress: - New telemetry payload fields to understand user journey through setup - Built-in privacy guards to protect sensitive user information - Helps improve the onboarding experience based on real usage data ## Bug Fixes * Fixed release pipeline issue where `--no-progress` flag was causing failures in apt/rpm package publishing. Replaced with `--quiet` flag for more reliable deployments. --- *Note: The onboarding improvements primarily affect the **Personal Edition** desktop application.* --- ## Download Installers | Platform | Download | Notes | |----------|----------|-------| | **macOS (Apple Silicon)** | [**…
